subcodes.title: Words to the Baha'is, spoken on 1912-10-03
subcodes.first_line: As there are four seasons in this material world, so it is in the spiritual world. When the divine spring is over and the heavenly bounty ceases
subcodes.first_line_orig: چنانچه در عالم جسمانی فصول اربعه هست در عالم روحانی نیز چنین است که چون بهار الهی منتهی و فیض رحمانی منقطع شود
subcodes.subjects: @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @spiritual springtime, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @spiritual transformation, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
